omitted_declarations.policy_reference: 7.2 Third parties to whom we may choose to sell, transfer or merge parts of our business or our assets. Alternatively, we may seek to acquire other businesses or merge with them. If a change happens to our business, then the new owners may use your personal data in the same way as set out in this privacy policy.

5.10 Third-party marketing. We will get your express opt-in consent before we share your personal data with any company outside the Car & Classic group of companies for marketing purposes.
